name: National Gypsum Company
summary: National Gypsum Company manufactures and sells gypsum and its derivatives in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia and internationally. The company offers regular, and fire and moisture resistant plaster boards; and boards laminated with lead sheet. It also provides gypsum powder products, such as plastering, sprinkling, spraying machine, adhesive, agricultural, and other products. The company was founded in 1958 and is headquartered in Riyadh, the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
